pathways.name: iOS 12 Performance Path
pathways.description: Adopt iOS 12's performance wins: scrolling, layout, memory, and graphics. Start with the methodology overview, learn the new os_signpost API, dig into memory profiling, then adopt the Auto Layout and image best practices.

pathways.name: Siri Shortcuts Adoption Path
pathways.description: Make your app's key actions available to Siri. Begin with the introduction and core concepts, learn how to build voice + custom UI experiences, then optimize donations and bring shortcuts to the watch.

pathways.name: ARKit 2 & USDZ Path
pathways.description: Master the new ARKit 2 features and the USDZ format. Start with the framework overview, learn AR Quick Look integration, design great AR content, then study Apple's open-source SwiftShot multiplayer game.

pathways.name: Create ML & Core ML 2 Path
pathways.description: Train your own custom models in Swift, then ship them with Core ML 2's quantization and batch APIs. Begin with Create ML, learn the new Core ML 2 features, then explore Natural Language and Vision integration.

pathways.name: Network Framework Migration Path
pathways.description: Move off raw sockets to Network.framework's modern transport API. Learn smart connection establishment, async send/receive, and mobility handling for resilient connections across networks.

pathways.name: Marzipan / Mac Catalyst Preview Path
pathways.description: Prepare your iPad app for the upcoming UIKit-on-Mac transition (releasing in 2019). Adopt the convergent APIs, safe area properly, and dark mode support that anticipate Catalyst.

pathways.name: Dark Mode for macOS Mojave Path
pathways.description: Adopt Dark Mode in your Mac app. Master semantic system colors, NSVisualEffectView materials, asset catalog appearance variants, and the new contentTintColor API.

pathways.name: Grouped & Interactive Notifications Path
pathways.description: Adopt iOS 12's grouped notifications, dynamic actions, user-interactive content extensions, provisional authorization, and (with entitlement) critical alerts.

pathways.name: watchOS 5 Audio & Workouts Path
pathways.description: Background audio for any app, the new HKWorkoutSession + HKLiveWorkoutBuilder API with crash recovery, and Siri Shortcuts on the Siri watch face.

pathways.name: Automatic Strong Passwords Path
pathways.description: Adopt iOS 12's automatic password generation, suggested usernames, SMS code autofill, and the new ASWebAuthenticationSession for federated sign-in.

pathways.name: Swift 4.2 Modernization Path
pathways.description: Adopt Swift 4.2's CaseIterable, conditional conformances, synthesized Hashable for enums-with-payloads, the new Hasher API, and the build-time speedups.

pathways.name: Metal 2 Graphics & Compute Path
pathways.description: Move off OpenGL (deprecated in 2018), adopt GPU-driven command encoding, ray tracing acceleration, and ML training on Metal Performance Shaders.

pathways.name: App Store & Subscriptions Path
pathways.description: Adopt introductory pricing, free trials for non-subscription apps, server-to-server notifications, billing-retry handling, and the new App Store Connect API for automation.

pathways.name: Fluid Interface Design Path
pathways.description: Internalize Apple's design principles for iPhone X-style fluid gestural interfaces. Cover principles, button design fidelity, and AR-specific interaction patterns.

clusters.name: iOS 12 Performance Wins
clusters.description: The headline year for iOS performance — scrolling, layout, memory, graphics, methodology

clusters.name: Siri Shortcuts (NEW)
clusters.description: Custom intents, NSUserActivity-based donations, voice + UI extensions, watch face

clusters.name: ARKit 2 & USDZ
clusters.description: Persistent worlds, multi-user, image tracking, 3D object detection, USDZ format, AR Quick Look

clusters.name: Create ML & Core ML 2
clusters.description: Train models in Swift, ship 4 to 8 times smaller models with quantization, customize via custom layers

clusters.name: Network.framework
clusters.description: Modern alternative to BSD sockets — connection logic, async I/O, mobility, user-space stack

clusters.name: Dark Mode for macOS Mojave
clusters.description: Semantic colors, vibrancy, accent colors, asset variants, NSVisualEffectView materials

clusters.name: Marzipan / Mac Catalyst Preview
clusters.description: UIKit-on-Mac sneak peek; UIKit and AppKit converge in preparation for 2019

clusters.name: Grouped Notifications
clusters.description: Threaded grouping, custom actions, user-interactive UI, provisional auth, critical alerts

clusters.name: watchOS 5
clusters.description: Background audio for any app, redesigned workout API + crash recovery, Siri shortcuts on the watch face

clusters.name: Automatic Strong Passwords
clusters.description: Auto-generated 20-char passwords, OTP autofill, password manager extensions, federated auth

clusters.name: Swift 4.2 Language
clusters.description: CaseIterable, conditional conformances, synthesized Hashable for enums, new Hasher API, faster builds

clusters.name: Metal 2 (OpenGL Deprecated)
clusters.description: GPU-driven command encoding, ray tracing acceleration, ML training, OpenGL migration

clusters.name: App Store & Subscriptions
clusters.description: Free trials for non-subscription apps, server-to-server notifications, billing retry, automation API

clusters.name: Fluid Interface Design
clusters.description: iPhone X-era design principles, button fidelity, fluid motion, AR design

clusters.name: Xcode 10 Tools
clusters.description: os_signpost, Custom Instruments, multi-cursor editing, dark mode, source control change bar

clusters.name: Image, Graphics & Memory
clusters.description: UIGraphicsImageRenderer, ImageIO thumbnails, automatic backing stores, memgraph debugging

clusters.name: Auto Layout & Collections
clusters.description: Linear-time layout, churn elimination, custom UICollectionView layouts, performBatchUpdates

clusters.name: Privacy & Security
clusters.description: Camera/mic gating, secure coding defaults, notarization, sandbox tightening, web content security

clusters.name: Health & Research
clusters.description: Medical records via HealthKit, redesigned workout API, ResearchKit and CareKit refresh

clusters.name: Accessibility
clusters.description: VoiceOver testing methodology, accessible drag-and-drop, custom actions, AR + accessibility
